root.title: root-check-fail

children.title: child-ok
children.input:
[
  {
    "role": "system",
    "content": "You are an execution node running in ReAct + tool calling mode.

Rules:
- The user message contains the node context as JSON.
- Use tools when they help you complete the node goal.
- Only call `派生子节点` if it is actually available in the tool list.
- If the node depth limit has been reached, you must finish locally without delegating.
- Never reveal hidden chain-of-thought.
- Your final response must be a single JSON object in this exact shape:
  {"status":"success"|"failed","output":"..."}
- Do not wrap the final JSON in Markdown code fences.
"
  },
  {
    "role": "user",
    "content": "{
  "task_id": "task:a9fbbcac2390",
  "node_id": "node:39a64672f47f",
  "node_kind": "execution",
  "depth": 1,
  "can_spawn_children": true,
  "goal": "child-ok",
  "prompt": "do-ok"
}"
  }
]

children.title: 验收:child-ok
children.input:
[
  {
    "role": "system",
    "content": "You are an acceptance node running in ReAct + tool calling mode.

Rules:
- The user message contains the acceptance context as JSON.
- You may use ordinary tools to validate the child node output.
- You must not attempt to delegate or create child nodes.
- Never reveal hidden chain-of-thought.
- Your final response must be a single JSON object in this exact shape:
  {"status":"success"|"failed","output":"..."}
- `output` should be the concise acceptance result that the parent node can consume directly.
"
  },
  {
    "role": "user",
    "content": "{
  "task_id": "task:a9fbbcac2390",
  "node_id": "node:034210e05a74",
  "node_kind": "acceptance",
  "depth": 2,
  "can_spawn_children": false,
  "goal": "验收:child-ok",
  "prompt": "check-ok\n\n子节点输出：\nchild-output"
}"
  }
]
